description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow surrounded by a low perimeter wall and mature trees, featuring a spacious yard with outdoor seating and landscaped areas. The building has a light gray exterior with large, rectangular windows and a prominent, dark hip roof. The front facade includes a double-door entrance, a set of steps, and symmetrical shrubbery, while the rear showcases a patio area with a pool, lounge furniture, and decorative climbing plants. The property is well-defined with paved walkways, a driveway, and a garage integrated into the main structure. The windows are generously sized, providing ample natural light, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional outdoor spaces. The architectural style is contemporary, with a focus on open, airy living and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, large windows, and landscaped yard, surrounded by trees and a low wall.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yard, outdoor seating, and several trees along the perimeter wall.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, steps, garage, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible driveway, more trees, and additional outdoor furniture.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring a patio, pool, lounge area, and decorative climbing plants on the facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on all facades
